name: tall room
hints: A tall room with a metal bar in the ceiling (too high to reach), a headless skeleton, and a saw.
GET SAW - you'll need it later. The metal bar is out of reach for now.
You need something to stand on to reach the bar. A table would help.
Bring the table from the dining hall (room 12), DROP TAB, then SAW BAR to cut it. N=burial room (8).
notes: Tall room with unreachable metal bar in ceiling. Need table to stand on, then SAW BAR. Saw is here. Skeleton warns of the chopping block trap. N=burial room (8).
